artifact_role: Execution-governance attestation only; not a research finding, scientific result, proof, evidence record, closeout, or maturity decision.

basis: The user requested continuation of M1 through three isolated agent lanes and separate pull requests after the accepted freeze decision identified separately governed study execution as the next increment.
The root steward delegated this lane only the formal machine-execution preflight and, conditionally, one exact analyzer invocation.
The frozen M1 study decision authorizes controlled Layer 1 execution only under every frozen term.
authorization_assessment.scope: Authorization was conditional on every identity, revision, digest, output-absence, tool, environment, and service-boundary gate passing.
not_authorized: Editing any frozen version-1 input, protocol, manifest, analyzer, registry entry, finding, or closeout
Interpreting a machine output as semantic validity, proof, evidence, candidate adoption, M1 completion, or product authority
authorization_assessment.execution_effect: The conditional authority did not mature into an analyzer run because a mandatory frozen guard failed.

public_main_binding.tracked_inventory_method: SHA-256 over the exact NUL-delimited bytes emitted by `git ls-tree -rz --full-tree HEAD` in the isolated clone.
remote_verification: Connected GitHub commit lookup resolved the requested commit in MalloyTheDev/LCMRP.
`git ls-remote https://github.com/MalloyTheDev/LCMRP.git refs/heads/main` returned the requested commit immediately before final preflight.

execution_snapshot.kind: Fresh shallow clone of public main in temporary storage

excluded_local_only_categories: The previously preserved M1 handoff archive
Concurrent agent-owned readiness, review, and test files
This execution lane's new attestation and provenance files
shared_workspace_comparison.boundary: All frozen inputs and every path tracked by the pinned public commit were compared; local-only and concurrent-lane files were never treated as part of the clean execution snapshot.

preflight_checks.check: Public-main commit and complete tracked-tree inventory
Clean isolated snapshot at the pinned revision
Repository validator with the declared development validation dependency
Independent active-registry, manifest, immutable-reference, and tool-digest recomputation
All seven planned output paths absent in both the isolated snapshot and shared workspace before execution
Exact CPython, kernel, architecture, and standard-library analyzer environment
Frozen analyzer's own active-index guard against the exact accepted registry
preflight_checks.error: StudyGuardError: canonical index entry lacks artifact_digest.value

blocking_condition.observed_behavior: The guard-only preflight imported the frozen analyzer and called enforce_frozen_manifest. It stopped inside verify_manifest_index before run_kernel or main was invoked.
blocking_condition.root_cause: The frozen verify_manifest_index regular expression requires eight leading spaces before artifact_digest.value. The exact schema-valid canonical registry uses six spaces at that YAML nesting level, so the frozen analyzer rejects its own accepted ACTIVE entry even though an independent parser verifies the manifest digest exactly.
blocking_condition.safety_effect: No analyzer invocation, valuation enumeration, result serialization, or result-file creation occurred.
blocking_condition.required_resolution: Do not patch version-1 bytes. Create a digest-linked, pre-result superseding study/tool record that binds a corrected guard, independently review and freeze it, reconfirm every output is absent, and rerun the full preflight before any execution.
blocking_condition.finding_effect: This attestation does not publish a HALTED research-finding disposition. ANALYSIS-FMO-01 remains without a result or atomic finding.

limitations: The repository suites did not invoke the analyzer guard against the canonical command and therefore did not detect this runtime blocker.

The first validator/test attempt under bare CPython could not import development-only jsonschema. The final passing validation used the already present jsonschema 4.25.1 site-packages with the same CPython 3.12.13 runtime; the analyzer itself remains standard-library-only.
No machine result exists, so there is nothing to interpret, reproduce, or promote.
Two independent human source-to-encoding mappings and adjudication remain absent.
No semantic validity, consistency, satisfiability, entailment, non-entailment, independence, authority, deletion, security, or usefulness conclusion is supported.
